2: 
3: use gpui::{Context, Entity, EventEmitter, Subscription};

5: use crate::git::diff::BufferDiffSnapshot;

7: use crate::git::types::RepoPath;
8: 
9: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
10: // Constants
11: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
12: 
13: /// Number of context lines above and below each hunk excerpt.
14: pub const HUNK_CONTEXT_LINES: u32 = 3;
15: 
16: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
17: // DiffExcerpt — a hunk with surrounding context
18: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
19: 
20: /// Represents a single hunk excerpt in the project diff view.
21: #[derive(Clone, Debug)]
22: pub struct DiffExcerpt {
23:     /// File path this excerpt belongs to.
24:     pub repo_path: RepoPath,
25:     /// Buffer ID for diff tracking.
26:     pub buffer_id: BufferId,
27:     /// Line range in the buffer (with context).
28:     pub context_range: Range<u32>,
29:     /// The actual hunk line range (without context).
30:     pub hunk_range: Range<u32>,
31:     /// Hunk index in the diff snapshot.
32:     pub hunk_index: usize,
33: }
34: 
35: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
36: // ProjectDiffEvent
37: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
38: 
39: #[derive(Clone, Debug)]
40: pub struct ProjectDiffEvent;
41: 
42: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
43: // ProjectDiff — multi-buffer diff view
44: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
45: 
46: /// Shows all changed files across the repo in a single scrollable view.
47: ///
48: /// Each changed file contributes excerpts (hunk + surrounding context) to
49: /// the view. All hunks are pre-expanded.
50: #[allow(dead_code)]
51: pub struct ProjectDiff {
52:     git_store: Entity<GitStore>,
53:     excerpts: Vec<DiffExcerpt>,
54:     current_hunk_index: Option<usize>,
55:     _subscriptions: Vec<Subscription>,
56: }
57: 
58: impl EventEmitter<ProjectDiffEvent> for ProjectDiff {}
59: 
60: impl ProjectDiff {
61:     pub fn new(
62:         git_store: Entity<GitStore>,
63:         cx: &mut Context<Self>,
64:     ) -> Self {
65:         let sub = cx.subscribe(&git_store, |this: &mut Self, _store, event, cx| {
66:             match event {
67:                 GitStoreEvent::StatusesChanged(_) | GitStoreEvent::ActiveRepositoryChanged => {
68:                     this.update_diff(cx);
69:                 }
70:                 _ => {}
71:             }
72:         });
73: 
74:         let mut view = Self {
75:             git_store,
76:             excerpts: Vec::new(),
77:             current_hunk_index: None,
78:             _subscriptions: vec![sub],
79:         };
80:         view.update_diff(cx);
81:         view
82:     }
83: 
84:     /// Rebuild the excerpts from all changed files.
85:     pub fn update_diff(&mut self, cx: &mut Context<Self>) {
86:         self.excerpts.clear();
87: 
88:         // In a full implementation, this would:
89:         // 1. Read GitStore.repository_statuses() for all changed files
90:         // 2. For each file, get the uncommitted_diff BufferDiffSnapshot
91:         // 3. Extract DiffHunks and build context ranges
92:         // 4. Build excerpts grouped by file
93:         //
94:         // For now, excerpts are populated via register_buffer_diff().
95: 
96:         cx.emit(ProjectDiffEvent);
97:         cx.notify();
98:     }
99: 
100:     /// Register a buffer's diff for display in the project diff view.
101:     pub fn register_buffer_diff(
102:         &mut self,
103:         repo_path: RepoPath,
104:         buffer_id: BufferId,
105:         snapshot: &BufferDiffSnapshot,
106:         total_lines: u32,
107:     ) {
108:         // Remove existing excerpts for this buffer.
109:         self.excerpts.retain(|e| e.buffer_id != buffer_id);
110: 
111:         for (i, hunk) in snapshot.internal_hunks().iter().enumerate() {
112:             let context_start = hunk.buffer_range.start.saturating_sub(HUNK_CONTEXT_LINES);
113:             let context_end = (hunk.buffer_range.end + HUNK_CONTEXT_LINES).min(total_lines);
114: 
115:             self.excerpts.push(DiffExcerpt {
116:                 repo_path: repo_path.clone(),
117:                 buffer_id,
118:                 context_range: context_start..context_end,
119:                 hunk_range: hunk.buffer_range.clone(),
120:                 hunk_index: i,
121:             });
122:         }
123:     }
124: 
125:     /// Get all excerpts.
126:     pub fn excerpts(&self) -> &[DiffExcerpt] {
127:         &self.excerpts
128:     }
129: 
130:     /// Total number of hunks across all files.
131:     pub fn hunk_count(&self) -> usize {
132:         self.excerpts.len()
133:     }
134: 
135:     /// Navigate to the next hunk.
136:     pub fn go_to_next_hunk(&mut self) -> Option<&DiffExcerpt> {
137:         if self.excerpts.is_empty() {
138:             return None;
139:         }
140:         let next = match self.current_hunk_index {
141:             None => 0,
142:             Some(idx) => (idx + 1).min(self.excerpts.len() - 1),
143:         };
144:         self.current_hunk_index = Some(next);
145:         self.excerpts.get(next)
146:     }
147: 
148:     /// Navigate to the previous hunk.
149:     pub fn go_to_prev_hunk(&mut self) -> Option<&DiffExcerpt> {
150:         if self.excerpts.is_empty() {
151:             return None;
152:         }
153:         let prev = match self.current_hunk_index {
154:             None => 0,
155:             Some(idx) => idx.saturating_sub(1),
156:         };
157:         self.current_hunk_index = Some(prev);
158:         self.excerpts.get(prev)
159:     }
160: 
161:     /// Get the current hunk index.
162:     pub fn current_hunk_index(&self) -> Option<usize> {
163:         self.current_hunk_index
164:     }
165: }
166: 
167: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
168: // Tests
169: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
170: 
171: #[cfg(test)]
172: mod tests {
173:     use super::*;
174:     use crate::git::diff::{compute_diff_hunks, BufferDiffSnapshot};
175: 
176:     #[test]
177:     fn test_register_buffer_diff() {
178:         let base = "line1\noriginal\nline3\nline4\nline5\n";
179:         let current = "line1\nmodified\nline3\nline4\nline5\n";
180:         let hunks = compute_diff_hunks(current, Some(base));
181:         let mut snapshot = BufferDiffSnapshot::new(Some(base.to_string()));
182:         snapshot.set_hunks(hunks);
183: 
184:         let mut excerpts = Vec::new();
185: 
186:         // Test register_buffer_diff logic directly without ProjectDiff entity.
187:         for (i, hunk) in snapshot.hunks().iter().enumerate() {
188:             let context_start = hunk.buffer_range.start.saturating_sub(HUNK_CONTEXT_LINES);
189:             let context_end = (hunk.buffer_range.end + HUNK_CONTEXT_LINES).min(5);
190: 
191:             excerpts.push(DiffExcerpt {
192:                 repo_path: RepoPath::from("test.rs"),
193:                 buffer_id: BufferId::new(1),
194:                 context_range: context_start..context_end,
195:                 hunk_range: hunk.buffer_range.clone(),
196:                 hunk_index: i,
197:             });
198:         }
199: 
200:         assert_eq!(excerpts.len(), 1);
201:         let excerpt = &excerpts[0];
202:         assert_eq!(excerpt.repo_path, RepoPath::from("test.rs"));
203:         assert!(excerpt.context_range.start <= excerpt.hunk_range.start);
204:         assert!(excerpt.context_range.end >= excerpt.hunk_range.end);
205:     }
206: 
207:     #[test]
208:     fn test_hunk_navigation_logic() {
209:         let excerpts = vec![
210:             DiffExcerpt {
211:                 repo_path: RepoPath::from("a.rs"),
212:                 buffer_id: BufferId::new(1),
213:                 context_range: 0..5,
214:                 hunk_range: 1..3,
215:                 hunk_index: 0,
216:             },
217:             DiffExcerpt {
218:                 repo_path: RepoPath::from("b.rs"),
219:                 buffer_id: BufferId::new(2),
220:                 context_range: 0..10,
221:                 hunk_range: 5..8,
222:                 hunk_index: 0,
223:             },
224:         ];
225: 
226:         // Test navigation logic inline.
227:         let mut current_idx: Option<usize> = None;
228: 
229:         // Go to next
230:         let next = match current_idx {
231:             None => 0,
232:             Some(idx) => (idx + 1).min(excerpts.len() - 1),
233:         };
234:         current_idx = Some(next);
235:         assert_eq!(excerpts[next].repo_path, RepoPath::from("a.rs"));
236: 
237:         // Go to next again
238:         let next = match current_idx {
239:             None => 0,
240:             Some(idx) => (idx + 1).min(excerpts.len() - 1),
241:         };
242:         current_idx = Some(next);
243:         assert_eq!(excerpts[next].repo_path, RepoPath::from("b.rs"));
244: 
245:         // Go to prev

247:             None => 0,
